'''Elrood''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who fought to acquire the funding necessary to undertake the colonization of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Elrood/Legends|Elrood]]. The planet was subsequently named in the senator's honor.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-09-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Three]]'' {{1stm}}
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
